data.title: Crypto Analyst Warns XRP Investors Amid Market Retrace
data.description:
Crypto analyst Steph has issued a warning to XRP investors regarding the current price action. He alluded to a multi-year resistance that the altcoin has struggled to break, noting that this should be the major focus as it eyes new highs. XRP Needs to Break Above the $3. 6 Resistance In an X post, Steph shared a video in which he analysed the XRP monthly chart, dating back to the 2020 bull run
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/analyst-warns-xrp-investors/

data.title: Robinhood Adds Hedera (HBAR) Spot Trading
data.description:
Robinhood, the popular investing platform, has recently announced the addition of Hedera (HBAR) to its offerings, allowing users to engage in spot trading for this cryptocurrency. This move marks an important expansion of Robinhood's cryptocurrency trading options, enabling its users to buy and sell HBAR directly on the platform in real-time, thereby enhancing their investment opportunities in the rapidly evolving digital asset market.
source: https://blocknews.com/robinhood-adds-hedera-hbar-spot-trading/

data.title: Bank Insider Drains $195,000 From Churches, Kids Museum and Customers, Fakes Own Death To Prevent Recovery of Incriminating Evidence: US Department of Justice
data.description:
A bank employee is pleading guilty to stealing from the lender’s customers and lying to conceal her guilt, according to the US Attorney’s Office for the Eastern District of Virginia. The Eastern District says Truist Bank employee, Ahshah Dior Martin, stole $195,000 from at least 70 Truist Bank accounts.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/26/bank-insider-drains-195000-from-churches-kids-museum-and-customers-fakes-own-death-to-prevent-recovery-of-incriminating-evidence-us-department-of-justice/
